sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78669" key="parapu/qia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπύθια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῡ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, Com. word, <sense id="n78669.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sickness which prevented one from being victor at the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Πύθια</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.129</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cereal.</author> </bibl>) ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρίσθμια</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
